attributes.action: Stop Sir Winston Churchill being axed from £5 British banknotes
attributes.additional_details: Because he was a hero and the greatest Prime Minister the United Kingdom has ever seen
attributes.background: I would like the government to keep the great Sir Winston Churchill on the banknotes

rejection.details:
Bank notes are the responsibility of the Bank of England, which is independent of the Government and Parliament.

You can find out how the Bank decides who will be on bank notes here:
https://www.bankofengland.co.uk/banknotes/banknote-characters
